patch.value:
Symptom: `--group-by` flag is silently ignored; chart always groups by milestone.
Repro: `pm gantt --group-by type --json` (with seeded items)
Observed: result reports `groupBy: "milestone"`, single group.
Expected: groupBy reflects the flag value (type/tag).
Root cause (bug class 1, option-key normalization): pm normalizes `--group-by` to camelCase `groupBy` at runtime (probe: ctx.options keys = ["groupBy","weeks","status"]), but code read ctx.options["group-by"] only -> undefined -> default "milestone".
Fix: readOption() helper reads both kebab+camel ("group-by","groupBy"). Verified: `--group-by type` -> groupBy:type/3 groups; `--group-by tag` -> 5 groups.
gantt: --group-by ignored (kebab vs camelCase option key)
